prompt: Generate a line graph showing weekly sales trends for two phone models: iPhone and Sony. Use Image 1 (iPhone) and Image 2 (Sony) as product icons, placing them next to the legend.
prompt_refined: Generate a line graph visualizing weekly sales trends for two phone models. The graph should feature two distinct lines: one for iPhone sales and one for Sony phone sales. Include a clear legend that identifies each sales line. For the iPhone sales entry in the legend, use a small visual of image 1 (a blue iPhone) as its product icon, positioned directly alongside its label. Similarly, for the Sony phone sales entry, use a small visual of image 2 (a grey Sony phone) as its product icon, placed directly alongside its respective label within the legend.
objects: small visual of blue iPhone (from image 1) as product icon in legend
Sony phone sales label in legend
small visual of grey Sony phone (from image 2) as product icon in legend
